x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist AI Search requires search sources to be configured and indexed. Without configured search sources, AI Search returns no results regardless of KB content quality or volume.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure Now Assist AI Search sources via sn_aisearch_search_profile_list.do. Add KB, catalog, and record sources relevant to your end-user use cases. Index each source. AI Search is entirely dependent on search source configuration.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist AI Search requires search sources to be configured and indexed. Without configured search sources, AI Search returns no results regardless of KB content quality or volume.]]></ai_justification><check_name>AI Search Index Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("ais_search_profile");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "AI Search profile table not found", finding: "AI Search (ais_search_profile) is not installed on this instance. AI Search may not be part of the current entitlement or configuration." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("ais_search_profile");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " active AI Search profile(s)";
    if (count >= 1) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " active AI Search profile(s) configured. Now Assist AI Search is set up to return results to end users." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No active AI Search profiles configured. Now Assist AI Search requires at least one active search profile with indexed sources — without it AI Search returns no results to end users." };
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000499</number><order>200</order><remediation_guidance>Configure Now Assist AI Search sources via sn_aisearch_search_profile_list.do. Add KB, catalog, and record sources relevant to your end-user use cases. Index each source. AI Search is entirely dependent on search source configuration.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>4ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AI Search Index Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_4ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
